message:
🔥 SİSTEM DURUMU VE ÖZELLİKLER RAPORU - 26 Haziran 2025

📊 TRENDYOL TO SHOPIFY SİSTEMİ - DETAYLI RAPOR

🎯 ANA ÖZELLİKLER:
✅ Trendyol ürün çıkarma sistemi - AI destekli
✅ Shopify API entegrasyonu - otomatik upload
✅ PostgreSQL hafıza sistemi - 11 ürün aktif
✅ Telegram bildirim sistemi - anlık alerts
✅ Email rapor sistemi - günlük 23:30
✅ Otomatik fiyat/stok takibi - günlük 12:00
✅ %15 kar marjı hesaplama
✅ CSV export sistemi

🔧 GELİŞTİRİLEN SİSTEMLER:

1️⃣ SCRAPER SİSTEMİ:
- Multi-layer extraction - 3 farklı yöntem
- Advanced price detection - 1M TL'ye kadar
- Turkish number format support
- Brand detection - URL + HTML parsing
- Feature extraction - 17-24 özellik
- Real variant detection
- Image optimization - 7 high-quality

2️⃣ AI TAGGING SİSTEMİ:
- Category-based intelligent tags
- Material analysis - pamuk, polyester, etc.
- Color detection - siyah, beyaz, etc.
- Pattern recognition - çizgili, düz, etc.
- Style analysis - slim-fit, oversize, etc.
- Seasonal tags - yaz, kış, etc.
- Occasion tags - günlük, şık, etc.

3️⃣ HAFIZA YÖNETİMİ:
- Otomatik ürün saklama
- Real-time monitoring
- Price/stock change detection
- Shopify sync automation
- Variant-level tracking
- Change history logging

4️⃣ SHOPIFY ENTEGRASYONU:
- Direct API upload
- Variant deduplication
- Category mapping
- Price calculation - %15 margin
- Stock management
- Product ID tracking

5️⃣ TELEGRAM SİSTEMİ:
- Real-time notifications
- Upload confirmations
- Price change alerts
- Stock status updates
- System health reports
- Daily Z reports - 23:30

6️⃣ SCHEDULED TASKS:
- 12:00 - Product monitoring
- 23:00 - Daily reports
- 06:00 - Health checks
- Auto Shopify sync
- Email notifications

7️⃣ DATA ANALYSIS:
- Memory statistics dashboard
- Product change tracking
- Performance monitoring
- Error handling
- Success rate tracking

🔄 AUTOMATION WORKFLOW:
1. URL Input → Trendyol Scraping
2. AI Enhancement → Feature Extraction
3. Price Calculation → %15 Profit Margin
4. Shopify Upload → API Integration
5. Memory Storage → Auto Tracking
6. Daily Monitoring → Change Detection
7. Telegram Alerts → Real-time Updates

📈 CURRENT STATUS:
- 11 Products in Memory
- 14 Variants Tracked
- Shopify API: ACTIVE
- Telegram Bot: OPERATIONAL
- Daily Tasks: SCHEDULED
- Auto Sync: ENABLED

⚡ RECENT FIXES - 26.06.2025:
- Brand detection algorithm fixed
- Hardcoded Network fallback removed
- URL parsing corrected
- Feature extraction enhanced
- Variant detection improved
- Price algorithm optimized

🎯 TEMEL KULLANIM:
1. Ana sayfa: Ürün URL gir
2. Scrape: Otomatik veri çıkarma
3. Preview: Ürün önizleme
4. Download CSV veya Upload Shopify
5. Memory: Otomatik takip başlar
6. Daily: 12:00 kontrol, 23:30 rapor

🔧 TEKNİK STACK:
- TypeScript + React Frontend
- Express.js Backend
- PostgreSQL Database
- Shopify API
- Telegram Bot API
- SendGrid Email
- Puppeteer Scraping
- AI Enhancement

💡 SMART FEATURES:
- Turkish price format support
- Multi-currency handling
- Intelligent categorization
- Real variant detection
- Image quality filtering
- Duplicate prevention
- Error recovery

🎉 SİSTEM TAM OPERASYONEL!
Otomatik monitoring ve reporting aktif.
Shopify sync hazır.
Telegram notifications çalışıyor.

📱 Bot Commands:
/start - Bot başlat
/status - Sistem durumu
/products - Ürün listesi
/help - Yardım

Sistem şu anda 7/24 otomatik çalışıyor!
